emails.subject: Re: deal 523015-Mike Swerzbin
emails.body: Re: deal 523015-Mike Swerzbin We show peak both in Enpower and in Mike's trade log. I'll check with Mike in the morning but in his log he has off-peak circled that could either mean he was questioning it or he was absolutely sure about it we'll find out though! Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 02/15/2001 03:22 PM
